task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Sonos Arc (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $899.00 and wholesale is $629.00. Product features: Premium soundbar with Dolby Atmos and voice assistant support. Reference: https://www.sonos.com/en-us/shop/arc

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Sonos Arc. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Sonos Arc. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
